# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 222. Funding & Fed. Aid
##### § 222.1001 — Definition

In this subchapter, “transportation project” has the meaning assigned by Section 370.003 (Definitions) .

*Added by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 114 (S.B.1110), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2013.*
